name: oh-my-harness
description: Cross-runtime coding-agent harness with Pi compatibility surfaces.

scripts.test:workspace-connectors: rm -rf .tmp/workspace-connectors-test && tsc --outDir .tmp/workspace-connectors-test --rootDir . --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --types node --skipLibCheck extensions/workspace-connectors/index.ts extensions/workspace-connectors/*.test.ts extensions/setup-doctor/index.ts extensions/setup-doctor/*.test.ts && node --test .tmp/workspace-connectors-test/extensions/workspace-connectors/*.test.js .tmp/workspace-connectors-test/extensions/setup-doctor/*.test.js
